mentions.note: At $16 level; Cramer says if you like new EV makers, Rivian is the one to be in (better than Lucid), but Cramer doesn't personally like either.
Last quarter better than expected; if Rivian makes it operationally, stock goes higher. Cramer surprised positively on execution.
R2 launch last week but stock stalling despite recent pivot to lifestyle brand and insider buying. Losing too much money; not going to buy here.
